title: Nth Magical Number
hints: Consider how many magical numbers exist up to a certain value X. Can you express this count using a, b, and X?
Use binary search on the answer X. For a given X, the count of multiples of a or b is needed to check if it is at least n.
The count of multiples of a or b up to X follows the inclusion-exclusion principle, requiring the least common multiple of a and b.
